LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ASIAN AND PACIFIC ISLANDER WELLNESS CENTER'S MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 664.6 IS CONTINUED TO JANUARY 12, 2016 (PER AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES), TO GIVE THE PLAINTIFF THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. THE PLAINTIFF PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN DECEMBER 29, 2015, AT 4:00 PM. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-19-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Defendant Asian And Pacific Islander Wellness Centers Motion To Enforce Settlement Pursuant To Ccp Section 664.6
Off Calendar Jan-12-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Alex Tovarian of Law Offices of Alex G. Tovarian telephone number 415-984-9990 for Plaintiff.
Steven Werth of Allen Glaessner Hazelwood Werth telephone number 415-697-2000 for Defendant.

Counsel reported that they met and conferred, and that they reached an agreement conformance with the stipulation for settlement. The terms of the settlement were stated on the record. In re: DEFENDANT ASIAN AND PACIFIC ISLANDER WELLNESS CENTER'S Motion To Enforce Settlement Pursuant To CCP Section 664.6 - The parties are to prepare/present a stipulated order.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/EG)

Notice Of Defendant Asian And Pacific Islander Wellness Centers Motion To Enforce Settlement Pursuant To Ccp Section 664.6
Off Calendar Dec-29-2015 Continued To Jan-12-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

DEFENDANT ASIAN AND PACIFIC ISLANDER WELLNESS CENTER'S Motion To Enforce Settlement Pursuant To CCP Section 664.6 is continued to January 12, 2016 (per agreement of the parties), to give the plaintiff the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. The plaintiff party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than December 29, 2015, at 4:00 pm. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving papers.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489. (302/EG)
